code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut cur = 0
mut neg = false

while i < n
  let bo = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bo
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        if neg
          sum = sum - cur
        else
          sum = sum + cur
        end
        count = count + 1
        cur = 0
        neg = false
        in_num = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      neg = true
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
  when None
    i = n
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  if neg
    sum = sum - cur
  else
    sum = sum + cur
  end
  count = count + 1
end

let avg = sum / count
print("avg=#{avg}")
